# Pull Request

## Summary

What changed?

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q src tests`
- [ ] `antma sanitize .`

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated, or not needed
- [ ] Changelog updated, or not needed

## Privacy

- [ ] No credentials, private paths, customer data, personal chat transcripts,
      or company-specific operating documents were added.

## Remaining Risk

What should reviewers pay attention to?
